description: Larvling lifecycle hooks for conversation tracking and extraction

hooks.command: export PYTHONPATH="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts" && PY=$(for p in python3.13 python3.12 python3.11 python3.10 python3; do command -v $p >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo $p && break; done); PY=${PY:-python} && $PY "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/preflight.py" && $PY "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/hooks/session_start.py"

export PYTHONPATH="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts" && PY=$(for p in python3.13 python3.12 python3.11 python3.10 python3; do command -v $p >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo $p && break; done); PY=${PY:-python} && $PY "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/hooks/prompt.py"

export PYTHONPATH="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts" && PY=$(for p in python3.13 python3.12 python3.11 python3.10 python3; do command -v $p >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo $p && break; done); PY=${PY:-python} && _TMP=$(mktemp) && cat >"$_TMP" && $PY "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/hooks/stop.py" <"$_TMP"; $PY "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/analyze.py" <"$_TMP"; rm -f "$_TMP"

export PYTHONPATH="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts" && PY=$(for p in python3.13 python3.12 python3.11 python3.10 python3; do command -v $p >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo $p && break; done); PY=${PY:-python} && $PY "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/hooks/session_end.py"
